creator: anders@fix.no
text:
On Fri, Jun 22, 2001 at 12:49:41AM +0200, Leif Neland wrote:
> Sorry; these lines was left put of my previous message.
> 
> Jun 22 00:47:08 arnold imapd[23148]: PAM unable to resolve symbol: pam_sm_open_session
> Jun 22 00:47:08 arnold imapd[23148]: PAM unable to resolve symbol: pam_sm_close_session
> Jun 22 00:47:08 arnold imapd[23148]: PAM unable to resolve symbol: pam_sm_chauthtok

Yes, this indicates that you did not configure PAM session support like
you were told to. Not a bug, I would say.

Cheers,

-- 
Anders.
